'''âs-z-s''' ('''kasazas''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:puebloize|puebloize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-z-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:puebloize|puebloize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âs-z-s
|-
! Lemma
| kasazas
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisazas|thisazas]] || [[word:jisazas|jisazas]] || [[word:shisazas|shisazas]] || [[word:kisazas|kisazas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusazas|thuthusazas]] || [[word:jujusazas|jujusazas]] || [[word:shushusazas|shushusazas]] || [[word:kukusazas|kukusazas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thusazas|thusazas]] || [[word:jusazas|jusazas]] || [[word:shusazas|shusazas]] || [[word:kusazas|kusazas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thusazas|thusazas]] || [[word:jusazas|jusazas]] || [[word:shusazas|shusazas]] || [[word:kusazas|kusazas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thesazas|thesazas]] || [[word:jesazas|jesazas]] || [[word:shesazas|shesazas]] || [[word:kesazas|kesazas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothosazas|thothosazas]] || [[word:jojosazas|jojosazas]] || [[word:shoshosazas|shoshosazas]] || [[word:kokosazas|kokosazas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thosazas|thosazas]] || [[word:josazas|josazas]] || [[word:shosazas|shosazas]] || [[word:kosazas|kosazas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosazas|thosazas]] || [[word:josazas|josazas]] || [[word:shosazas|shosazas]] || [[word:kosazas|kosazas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠsazas|thĂŠsazas]] || [[word:jĂŠsazas|jĂŠsazas]] || [[word:shĂŠsazas|shĂŠsazas]] || [[word:kĂŠsazas|kĂŠsazas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathasazas|thathasazas]] || [[word:jajasazas|jajasazas]] || [[word:shashasazas|shashasazas]] || [[word:kakasazas|kakasazas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasazas|thasazas]] || [[word:jasazas|jasazas]] || [[word:shasazas|shasazas]] || [[word:kasazas|kasazas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasazas|thasazas]] || [[word:jasazas|jasazas]] || [[word:shasazas|shasazas]] || [[word:kasazas|kasazas]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shasazas|shasazas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshasazas|goshasazas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishasazas|gokishasazas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shasazasnĂŒ|shasazasnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshasazasnknĂŒ|goshasazasnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishasazasnĂŒ|gokishasazasnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shasazashĂ«|shasazashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshasazasnkshĂ«|goshasazasnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishasazashĂ«|gokishasazashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasazasro|shasazasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasazasnkro|goshasazasnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasazasro|gokishasazasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shasazasmu|shasazasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasazasnkmu|goshasazasnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasazasmu|gokishasazasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shasazasher|shasazasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshasazasnksher|goshasazasnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishasazasher|gokishasazasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shasazasng|shasazasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshasazasnkng|goshasazasnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishasazasng|gokishasazasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shasazasya|shasazasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshasazasnkya|goshasazasnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishasazasya|gokishasazasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shasazasyam|shasazasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshasazasnkyam|goshasazasnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishasazasyam|gokishasazasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasazasnĂŒshĂ«|shasazasnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasazasnknĂŒshĂ«|goshasazasnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasazasnĂŒshĂ«|gokishasazasnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasazasnĂŒro|shasazasnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasazasnknĂŒro|goshasazasnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasazasnĂŒro|gokishasazasnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasazasnĂŒmu|shasazasnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasazasnknĂŒmu|goshasazasnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasazasnĂŒmu|gokishasazasnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasazashĂ«nĂŒ|shasazashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasazasnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshasazasnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasazashĂ«nĂŒ|gokishasazashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasazashĂ«ro|shasazashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasazasnkshĂ«ro|goshasazasnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasazashĂ«ro|gokishasazashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasazashĂ«mu|shasazashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasazasnkshĂ«mu|goshasazasnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasazashĂ«mu|gokishasazashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasazasronĂŒ|shasazasronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasazasnkronĂŒ|goshasazasnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasazasronĂŒ|gokishasazasronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasazasroshĂ«|shasazasroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasazasnkroshĂ«|goshasazasnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasazasroshĂ«|gokishasazasroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasazasromu|shasazasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasazasnkromu|goshasazasnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasazasromu|gokishasazasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasazasmunĂŒ|shasazasmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasazasnkmunĂŒ|goshasazasnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasazasmunĂŒ|gokishasazasmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasazasmushĂ«|shasazasmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasazasnkmushĂ«|goshasazasnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasazasmushĂ«|gokishasazasmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasazasmuro|shasazasmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasazasnkmuro|goshasazasnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasazasmuro|gokishasazasmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
